g.text: 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, Alberta | File VAL251026
This category accounts for the time period between occupants, as well as possible prolonged vacancies under slow
market conditions. Market participants typically expect a vacancy of 2% to 5% of potential gross income for similar
property types. This assignment reflects the probable vacancy during the economic life of the property and not
necessarily the current or short-term vacancy. The findings of the Multi-Family Market Overview section support a
typical vacancy allocation. As of the effective date, the subject is 91.7% occupied. Based on current and perceived
long-term market conditions and the subject's anticipated tenancy over a typical holding period, a vacancy allowance
Effective gross revenue equals the potential gross revenue less vacancy. The total effective gross revenue for the
We have reviewed the owner’s historical operating expenses. As appropriate, the owner’s operating expenses are
reclassified into standard categories and exclude items that do not reflect normal operating expenses for this type
of property. The reclassification is done for proper analysis against comparable data and industry benchmarks as
appropriate. The subject’s historical operating expenses with our projections are shown in the following chart.
